goal_results.evidence: auth_middleware.rs:157-178 — onboarding-aware bypass added in Unauthorized branch: checks is_local && is_onboarding_bypass_path(path), then inserts AuthIdentity { method: AuthMethod::Loopback } and calls next.run(request).await for early return.

auth_middleware.rs:162-170 — calls state.gateway.services.onboarding.wizard_status().await, reads v.get("onboarded").and_then(|v| v.as_bool()), defaults to true via unwrap_or(true), bypass only activates when !onboarded.

auth_middleware.rs:233-239 — is_onboarding_bypass_path() allows only /api/sessions/, /api/bootstrap, /api/gon, /api/tailscale/, /ws/. Privileged endpoints like /api/config and /api/restart are NOT included. Test local_privileged_api_during_onboarding_requires_auth (line 1766) verifies /api/config returns 401.
auth_middleware.rs:15 — 'use tracing::{debug, warn}' imports debug. Line 172 — debug!(path, remote = %addr, "auth bypass: local request during onboarding") emits trace when bypass activates.

auth_middleware.rs tests (lines 1580-1779): MockOnboardingService with AtomicBool for onboarded flag, plus 4 test functions: (a) local_api_during_onboarding_bypasses_auth — local+not-onboarded → 200, (b) local_api_after_onboarding_requires_auth — local+onboarded → 401, (c) remote_api_during_onboarding_requires_auth — remote+not-onboarded → 401, (d) local_privileged_api_during_onboarding_requires_auth — local+not-onboarded+/api/config → 401.

judge_notes: All 5 goals fully met. The agent's patch exactly matches the canonical fix: onboarding bypass in the Unauthorized branch gated on wizard_status() onboarded boolean, scoped to narrow path allowlist, with debug tracing, and 4 integration tests covering all behavioral dimensions. All 6 test.sh grep gates pass. Score = 0.30+0.30+0.20+0.07+0.13 = 1.00.
